title: Case Studies
sub: A few projects that show how we actually work, not just what we say.

01.heading: TANZANIA DELIVERY
01.title: A National Curriculum Deadline, Met Early
01.desc: Tanzania Institute of Education needed volume fast. We delivered 4M books within 60 days against a hard national deadline.
01.descSafe: A national curriculum programme needed volume fast. We delivered 4M books within 60 days against a hard national deadline.

02.heading: NIGERIA DELIVERY
02.title: Scaling for a Universal Education Mandate
02.desc: Books for the Universal Basic Education Commission, produced and shipped at a scale most printers can't sustain.
02.descSafe: Books for a national basic-education mandate, produced and shipped at a scale most printers can't sustain.

03.heading: USAID GHANA DELIVERY
03.title: Delivering Against a Funded Programme Timeline
03.desc: Books delivered under a USAID funded programme, coordinated end to end from print to last mile delivery.
03.descSafe: Books delivered under a donor-funded education programme, coordinated end to end from print to last mile delivery.
